nodes.label: Production Readiness Audit Plan
nodes.rationale: Full reverse-engineering audit of the Dento-HealthCare monorepo. Verdict: NOT PRODUCTION-READY. Seven critical issues block launch: PHI IDOR on medical records and AI diagnosis history, hardcoded admin credentials in repo, broken AI diagnosis prompt (no patient data sent to Gemini), Axios client missing withCredentials so session auth fails on protected pages, zero tests/CI, and no privacy/compliance framework. Estimated 4-6 weeks with 1-2 senior engineers to reach minimal safe MVP.

nodes.label: AI Subsystem (Gemini 2.5 Flash Diagnosis + Chat + TTS)
nodes.norm_label: ai subsystem (gemini 2.5 flash diagnosis + chat + tts)

nodes.label: Design System Guidelines (Material Design adapted for Healthcare)
nodes.rationale: Material Design was chosen over other approaches because the application is utility-focused, information-dense, and requires clinical efficiency with clear data hierarchy. RTL layout for Arabic is a first-class requirement. Animation is deliberately minimal (no scroll-triggered effects, no decorative motion) to prioritize clinical speed.
